verdict_reasoning: TGOLN2 is a type I integral membrane protein resident to the trans-Golgi network (TGN) and early endosomes. Although it is a membrane-anchored protein, it cycles exclusively within the endomembrane system (TGN ↔ early endosome) and has no documented route to the plasma membrane outer leaflet. No surface-targeted therapeutic programs, cell-state-induced surfacing, or ectodomain-shedding mechanism is reported. The protein is not secreted and does not reach the extracellular face.
